focus: Different from the IU X-Ray dataset, each caption in PEIR Gross contains only one sentence.
source: The Pathology Education Informational Resource (PEIR) digital libraryPEIR is ©University of Alabama at Birmingham, Department of Pathology. (http://peir.path.uab.edu/library/) is a public medical image library for medical education. We collected the images together with their descriptions in the Gross sub-collection, resulting in the PEIR Gross dataset that contains 7,442 image-caption pairs from 21 different sub-categories. Different from the IU X-Ray dataset, each caption in PEIR Gross contains only one sentence. We used this dataset to evaluate our model’s ability of generating single-sentence report.
good_tr: 病理学教育资源（PEIR）数字图书馆由阿拉巴马大学伯明翰分校病理学系版权所有（http://peir.path.uab.edu/library/），是一个用于医学教育的公共医学图像库。我们收集了“大体”子集合中的图像及其描述，构建了包含来自21个不同子类别的7,442个图像-标题对的PEIR Gross数据集。与IU X-Ray数据集不同，PEIR Gross中的每个标题仅包含一个句子。我们使用该数据集来评估我们的模型生成单句报告的能力。

focus: it has a strongly negative effect on the persistence of trophic networks
source: Thébault and Fontaine consider a variant of the dynamics described by Eq. () that can describe both mutualistic and trophic interaction. The core difference between mutualistic and trophic interactions is the sign of the term that represents animal-plant interactions. They found that network structure has an opposite effect on the stability of mutualistic networks as compared to the stability of trophic networks. In particular, nestedness has a positive effect on the resilience of mutualistic networks, defined as the speed at which the community returns to equilibrium after a perturbation in the system. By contrast, it has a strongly negative effect on the persistence of trophic networks, defined as the proportion of existing species after equilibrium is reached.
good_tr: Thébault 和 Fontaine 考虑了由方程 () 描述的动力学的一个变体，该变体能够同时描述互利共生和营养相互作用。互利共生相互作用与营养相互作用之间的核心区别在于代表动物-植物相互作用的项的符号。他们发现，网络结构对互利共生网络稳定性的影响与对营养网络稳定性的影响相反。具体而言，嵌套性对互利共生网络的恢复力具有积极影响，这里的恢复力定义为系统在受到扰动后群落返回平衡状态的速度。相比之下，嵌套性对营养网络的持久性具有强烈的负面影响，这里的持久性定义为达到平衡后现存物种的比例。

focus: more nested networks are associated with larger feasibility domains
source: Feasibility in systems with competition and mutualism [Section ]. In systems with both competition and mutualism, nestedness enhances the increase of biodiversity due to mutualism , and more nested networks are associated with larger feasibility domains, i.e., the network’s nodes can co-exist for a larger range of environmental conditions .

focus: better than individual nestedness contributions
source: Saavedra et al. found that both in ecological mutualistic networks and in economic manufacturer-contractor networks, individual contributions to nestedness are heterogeneously distributed, and some nodes give a significantly larger contribution than the others. Through simulations on mutualistic networks based on a model of mutualistic interactionsWe refer to for details. The model is essentially the same that has been applied in other works to uncover the impact of nestedness on systemic feasibility and dynamical stability – see Section ., they found that the strongest contributors to nestedness are also those whose extinction has the largest impact on network persistenceA recent study indicates that non-linear iterative algorithms perform better than individual nestedness contributions in identifying the most important and vulnerable network nodes under targeted attack. See Section for a detailed presentation.. The results of numerical simulations indicate that, ironically, the strongest contributors are also the most vulnerable nodes to extinction .

focus: less floating point operations than ResNet-152
source: The fifth improvement made is the new CNN feature extractor named Darknet-53. It is a 53 layered CNN that uses skip connections network inspired from ResNet . It uses also and convolutional layers. It has shown the state of the art accuracy but with fewer floating point operations and better speed. For example, it has less floating point operations than ResNet-152 but the same performance at a double speed.

focus: its yield is about five times smaller than that of
source: The situation for electron and muon reconstruction is instead significantly different. At the -factories, the invariant mass peak reconstructed using different lepton flavours is similar, as shown in Fig. . In particular, the event yields are similar indicating that the efficiency to reconstruct the two final states is comparable. Due to the combined effect of reduced bremsstrahlung and of a performant recovery algorithm, the dilepton invariant mass distribution for the final state only exhibits a slightly wider peak and a small radiative tail compared to the final state. On the contrary, the invariant mass reconstructed by LHCb when the is identified via its decay to two muons or two electrons manifests striking differences, as displayed in Fig. . Despite the bremsstrahlung recovery procedure, the electron final state features a long radiative tail and its yield is about five times smaller than that of . The decay mode can also provide interesting information to compare the -factories and the LHCb experiment. The yield reported in Ref. can be scaled to the full integrated luminosity of the -factories, amounting to about events that are roughly evenly split between the electron and muon final states. While this number is similar to the yield () reported in Ref. by LHCb, the yield is more than seven times larger. These significant differences between final states with electron and muon led the LHCb collaboration to exploit double ratios to measure the and observables (see Sec. ).

focus: the SPS predictions significantly outperform the IMF predictions
source: A recent work by the World Bank systematically compared the predictions of the SPS based on country fitness with those by the International Monetary Fund (IMF). They found that, when one only considers countries that are in the predictable region of the fitness-GDPpc plane, the SPS predictions significantly outperform the IMF predictions. The performance of the SPS and IMF are comparable when one considers all the countries. With respect to the IMF growth model which builds upon many variables, the SPS method is very parsimonious, as it only involves one parameter: country fitness. In a subsequent work, Tacchella et al. found that proper data sanitation can substantially increase the volume of the predictable region; on the cleaned data, the predictions by the SPS method over a five-year time horizon outperform those by the IMF even when one considers both high- and low-fitness countries. Besides, the predictions by the SPS can be combined with those by the IMF to substantially improve the GDPpc forecasts. Myanmar, Cambodia, and India turned out to be the three countries whose GDPpc’s forecast benefited most from the combination of SPS and IMF results .
good_tr: 世界银行最近的一项工作系统地比较了基于国家适应度的SPS预测与国际货币基金组织（IMF）的预测。他们发现，当仅考虑位于适应度-人均GDP平面可预测区域的国家时，SPS预测显著优于IMF预测。当考虑所有国家时，SPS和IMF的表现相当。与建立在许多变量基础上的IMF增长模型相比，SPS方法非常简约，因为它只涉及一个参数：国家适应度。在随后的一项工作中，Tacchella等人发现，适当的数据清洗可以大幅增加可预测区域的体积；在清洗后的数据上，即使同时考虑高适应度和低适应度国家，SPS方法在五年时间范围内的预测也优于IMF的预测。此外，将SPS的预测与IMF的预测相结合，可以大幅改善人均GDP的预测。缅甸、柬埔寨和印度被证明是三个从SPS和IMF结果结合中受益最大的人均GDP预测国家。
bad_tr: 世界银行最近的一项工作系统地比较了基于国家适应度的SPS预测与国际货币基金组织（IMF）的预测。他们发现，当仅考虑位于适应度-人均GDP平面可预测区域的国家时，IMF的预测显著优于SPS的预测。当考虑所有国家时，SPS和IMF的表现相当。与建立在许多变量基础上的IMF增长模型相比，SPS方法非常简约，因为它只涉及一个参数：国家适应度。在随后的一项工作中，Tacchella等人发现，适当的数据清洗可以大幅增加可预测区域的范围；在清洗后的数据上，即使同时考虑高适应度和低适应度的国家，SPS方法在五年时间范围内的预测也优于IMF的预测。此外，将SPS的预测与IMF的预测相结合，可以大幅改善人均GDP的预测结果。缅甸、柬埔寨和印度被证明是三个从SPS和IMF结果结合中受益最大的人均GDP预测国家。

focus: negative
source: Fortuna et al. analyzed 95 ecological communities including plant–animal mutualistic networks and host–parasite networks. First, they found a significant correlation between nestedness and modularity for plant–pollinator networks () but not for plant–seed disperser () and host-parasite () networks. Importantly, by using two statistical null models, they found that the relation between nestedness and modularity strongly depends on network connectivity: at low (high) connectivity, the two properties tend to be positively (negatively) correlated – in other words, the correlation between the nestedness-modularity correlation and network connectance is negative (Fig. ).
good_tr: Fortuna等人分析了95个生态群落，包括植物-动物互惠网络和宿主-寄生虫网络。首先，他们发现植物-传粉者网络的嵌套性与模块化之间存在显著相关性（），但植物-种子传播者网络（）和宿主-寄生虫网络（）中则不存在这种相关性。重要的是，通过使用两种统计零模型，他们发现嵌套性与模块化之间的关系强烈依赖于网络连接度：在低（高）连接度下，这两个属性倾向于呈正（负）相关——换句话说，嵌套性-模块化相关性与网络连接度之间的相关性为负（图）。
bad_tr: Fortuna等人分析了95个生态群落，包括植物–动物互惠网络和宿主–寄生虫网络。首先，他们发现植物–传粉者网络的嵌套性与模块性之间存在显著相关性（），但植物–种子传播者网络（）和宿主–寄生虫网络（）中则不存在这种相关性。重要的是，通过使用两种统计零模型，他们发现嵌套性与模块性之间的关系强烈依赖于网络的连通性：在低（高）连通性下，这两个属性倾向于呈正（负）相关——换句话说，嵌套性–模块性相关性与网络连通度之间的相关性为正（图）。

focus: larger than or equal to
source: A feasible equilibrium point is not necessarily globally stable, and a globally stable equilibrium point is not necessarily feasible. The existence of a unique globally stable equilibrium point is only guaranteed when the interaction matrix is positive-defined, i.e., when all its eigenvalues have a positive real part (see Section and ). Numerically, one finds that in the linearized version of the model with competition and mutualism (i.e., the model defined by Eq. () with handling times equal to zero), the real part of the largest eigenvalue of tends to decrease with the mean mutualistic interaction strength . Hence, the convergence to a unique globally stable equilibrium is guaranteed up to a critical value of the interaction strength; such point is numerically determined as the smallest value such that one of the eigenvalues of reaches zero . The larger , the stronger mutualistic interactions can be tolerated by the system without losing global stability, i.e., the more globally stable the system . Therefore, one can study the impact of a structural property on the global stability of the system by studying its relation with : a positive correlation would imply that that structural property favors the global stability of the systemIn this discussion, we have referred to the linearized version of the model (). The critical value for the non-linear dynamics is larger than or equal to the critical value for the linearized dynamics, which implies that the critical value determined with the linearized dynamics serves as an upper bound to the range of mutualism that allows for global stability. We refer to for all the details..

focus: nestedness has a positive effect on the resilience of mutualistic networks
source: Thébault and Fontaine consider a variant of the dynamics described by Eq. () that can describe both mutualistic and trophic interaction. The core difference between mutualistic and trophic interactions is the sign of the term that represents animal-plant interactions. They found that network structure has an opposite effect on the stability of mutualistic networks as compared to the stability of trophic networks. In particular, nestedness has a positive effect on the resilience of mutualistic networks, defined as the speed at which the community returns to equilibrium after a perturbation in the system. By contrast, it has a strongly negative effect on the persistence of trophic networks, defined as the proportion of existing species after equilibrium is reached.
good_tr: Thébault 和 Fontaine 考虑了由方程 () 描述的动力学的一个变体，该变体能够同时描述互利共生和营养相互作用。互利共生相互作用与营养相互作用之间的核心区别在于代表动物-植物相互作用的项的符号。他们发现，网络结构对互利共生网络稳定性的影响与对营养网络稳定性的影响相反。具体而言，嵌套性对互利共生网络的恢复力具有正向影响，其中恢复力定义为系统在受到扰动后群落返回平衡状态的速度。相比之下，嵌套性对营养网络的持久性具有强烈的负向影响，其中持久性定义为达到平衡后现存物种的比例。

focus: more than five times larger than the combined yields at the -factories
source: The PID performances for pions and kaons at the three experiments are similar, as well as the mass resolution for fully reconstructed final states to charged hadrons. The background contamination is also comparable for such decays, as can be concluded by examining, for example, the study of the decay carried out by the three collaborations. The BaBar and Belle experiments have similar performances, where the difference in yields is due to the different integrated luminosities analysed and a slightly more efficient selection for the Belle result. The yields obtained by the LHCb experiment on the Run1 dataset are more than five times larger than the combined yields at the -factories, with a lower level of combinatorial background and a similar / cross-feed. While the determination of the absolute scale of the experimental efficiencies is more challenging in the much busier environment of the LHC compared to the -factories, measurements of ratios of observables enable their full control and exploitation of the entire statistical power of these samples.
good_tr: 三个实验中对π介子和K介子的粒子鉴别（PID）性能相似，对完全重建的末态到带电强子的质量分辨率也相似。此类衰变的本底污染水平也相当，这可以通过考察例如三个合作组对该衰变的研究得出。BaBar和Belle实验的性能相近，其产额差异源于所分析的积分亮度不同，以及Belle结果的选择效率略高。LHCb实验在Run1数据集上获得的产额比B工厂的合计产额高出五倍以上，同时具有更低的组合本底水平和相似的串扰。尽管与B工厂相比，在LHC更为繁忙的环境中确定实验效率的绝对标度更具挑战性，但通过对可观测量比值的测量，可以实现对其的全面控制，并充分利用这些样本的全部统计能力。

focus: planet mass and the gaseous gap width
source: We try to find the relationship between the planet mass and the gap properties (such as the gap width and depth ), using the dust intensity profiles in Figure . Previous works such as studied the relationship between the planet mass and the gaseous gap width and depth. However, mm observations are probing dust with sizes up to mm/cm and these dust can drift in the gaseous disk. Thus, studying only the gaseous gap profiles is not sufficient for explaining mm observations and carrying out a similar study but directly for dust continuum maps is needed. We seek to first find a relationship between disk and planet properties (, , and ) using the fitting of the azimuthally averaged gas surface density profile, and characterize those three parameters using a single parameter (for the depth- relation) or (for the width-’ relation). Then, we fit the azimutally averaged dust intensity profile for our grid of models and find their depth- and width- relations. Overall, our fitting follows and but extend those relationships to dust particles with different sizes.
good_tr: 我们尝试利用图中的尘埃强度剖面，寻找行星质量与间隙特性（如间隙宽度和深度）之间的关系。先前的工作（例如）研究了行星质量与气体间隙宽度和深度之间的关系。然而，毫米波观测探测的是尺寸高达毫米/厘米级的尘埃，这些尘埃会在气体盘中发生漂移。因此，仅研究气体间隙剖面不足以解释毫米波观测结果，有必要开展一项类似的研究，但直接针对尘埃连续谱图进行。我们首先通过拟合方位角平均的气体面密度剖面，寻找盘和行星属性（、和）之间的关系，并使用单个参数（用于深度-关系）或（用于宽度-’关系）来表征这三个参数。然后，我们对模型网格中的方位角平均尘埃强度剖面进行拟合，并确定其深度-和宽度-关系。总体而言，我们的拟合遵循和的方法，但将这些关系扩展到了不同尺寸的尘埃颗粒。

focus: the fitness-complexity metric exhibits systematically larger extinction areas than all the other metrics
source: In line with this expectation, Domínguez-García and Muñoz found that in mutualistic networks, the fitness-complexity metric exhibits systematically larger extinction areas than all the other metrics, including closeness centrality, eigenvector centrality, betweenness centrality, degree centrality inverse contributions to nestedness, Google’s PageRank – see Fig. for the main result, and Appendix for the definitions of the existing metrics. The fitness-complexity metric achieves a similar performance as a computationally expensive genetic algorithm specifically designed by the authors in order to find a ranking of the nodes that maximizes the extinction area. Domínguez-García and Muñoz concluded that the fitness-complexity algorithm should be used to construct rankings of species by importance in mutualistic networks.
good_tr: 与这一预期一致，Domínguez-García 和 Muñoz 发现，在互惠网络中，适应度-复杂度指标所表现出的灭绝面积系统地大于所有其他指标，包括接近中心性、特征向量中心性、介数中心性、度中心性、对嵌套性的逆贡献以及谷歌的 PageRank——主要结果见图，现有指标的定义见附录。适应度-复杂度指标的性能与一种计算成本高昂的遗传算法相当，该遗传算法由作者专门设计，旨在寻找能够最大化灭绝面积的节点排序。Domínguez-García 和 Muñoz 得出结论，在互惠网络中，应使用适应度-复杂度算法来构建按重要性排序的物种排名。
bad_tr: 与这一预期一致，Domínguez-García 和 Muñoz 发现，在互惠网络中，适应度-复杂度指标所表现出的灭绝面积系统地小于所有其他指标，包括接近中心性、特征向量中心性、介数中心性、度中心性、对嵌套性的逆贡献以及谷歌的 PageRank——主要结果见图，现有指标的定义见附录。适应度-复杂度指标取得了与一种计算昂贵的遗传算法相似的性能，该遗传算法由作者专门设计，旨在寻找一种能够最大化灭绝面积的节点排序。Domínguez-García 和 Muñoz 得出结论，在互惠网络中，应使用适应度-复杂度算法来构建按重要性排序的物种排名。

focus: the distance between two given species in the interaction network is significantly correlated with their distance in the phylogeny
source: Beyond relative species abundance distribution, Rezende et al. aimed to detect the presence of aphylogenetic signal for plants and animals assemblages for 36 plant-pollinator and 23 plant-frugivore mutualistic networks. To detect phylogenetic signal, they compared the properties of the empirical networks with those numerically generated based on the structure of the species phylogenetic history . They found a fundamental difference between species degree (i.e., number of interactors per species) and species strength (i.e., number of recorded interactions): differently from species strength, species degree exhibits a strong phylogenetic signal . Besides, they found that the distance between two given species in the interaction network is significantly correlated with their distance in the phylogeny: for most communities, phylogenetically-similar species tend to play similar roles in the interaction network. In a different article, Rezende et al. found that phylogenetic effects can significantly contribute to nestedness. Overall, information on relative abundance and phenology can be sufficient to predict the level of nestedness of a network, yet it cannot predict the detailed network structure .
good_tr: 除了相对物种丰度分布之外，Rezende等人旨在检测36个植物-传粉者网络和23个植物-食果动物互惠网络中植物和动物群落是否存在系统发育信号。为了检测系统发育信号，他们将实证网络的属性与基于物种系统发育历史结构数值生成的网络的属性进行了比较。他们发现物种度（即每个物种的互作伙伴数量）与物种强度（即记录的互作次数）之间存在根本差异：与物种强度不同，物种度表现出强烈的系统发育信号。此外，他们发现相互作用网络中两个给定物种之间的距离与其在系统发育树上的距离显著相关：对于大多数群落而言，系统发育上相似的物种倾向于在相互作用网络中扮演相似的角色。在另一篇文章中，Rezende等人发现系统发育效应可以显著促进嵌套性。总体而言，关于相对丰度和物候的信息可能足以预测网络的嵌套性水平，但无法预测详细的网络结构。

focus: 2.6 lower than the SM expectation
source: The and measurements performed by the LHCb collaboration are found to be 2.6 and 2.1–2.5 lower than the SM expectation (Fig. ), respectively . The BaBar and Belle measurements, which have a more limited precision, are found to be in agreement with the SM expectation. Significant deviations with respect to the SM predictions would indicate a violation of LU that cannot be due to hadronic effects, as these would impact in the same way and transitions. Such effects, however, are particularly relevant in regard to the deviations observed in alone, where there is an ongoing discussion concerning the size of hadronic effects (see Sec. ). It is sometimes stated that observables have always limited hadronic uncertainties, but this statement must be modulated. More specifically, the hadronic uncertainties remain small as long as there are no significant LU-violating effects. If these are present, interferences between LU-violating and conserving contributions may spoil the cancellation of hadronic uncertainties. These effects might come from NP or from lepton-mass effects in the SM. The latter are only important at low , wherever is not small compared to 1 (e.g. below ), and affect in particular the first measured bin in . In this bin one thus expects larger theoretical uncertainties than in the region above 1, as well as at any value of in the presence of LU-violating NP .
good_tr: LHCb 合作组进行的 和 测量结果分别比标准模型（SM）预期低 2.6 和 2.1–2.5（见图 ）。BaBar 和 Belle 的测量精度较为有限，其结果与标准模型预期一致。相对于标准模型预测的显著偏离将表明存在轻子普适性（LU）破坏，而这种破坏不能归因于强子效应，因为强子效应对 和 跃迁的影响方式相同。然而，此类效应在仅针对 观察到的偏离方面尤为相关，目前关于强子效应的大小仍存在讨论（见第 节）。有时人们声称 可观测量始终具有有限的强子不确定性，但这一说法需要加以限定。具体而言，只要不存在显著的 LU 破坏效应，强子不确定性就保持较小。如果存在此类效应，LU 破坏贡献与守恒贡献之间的干涉可能会破坏强子不确定性的抵消。这些效应可能来自新物理（NP），也可能来自标准模型中的轻子质量效应。后者仅在低 区域重要，即在 与 1 相比不可忽略的情况下（例如低于 ），并且特别影响 中第一个测量区间。因此，在该区间中，理论不确定性预计高于 大于 1 的区域，以及在存在破坏 LU 的新物理时任何 值下的情况。

focus: maximally unstable
source: Local stability in mutualistic systems without interspecific competition [Section ]. For purely mutualistic systems (i.e., systems without interspecific competition), under the assumptions of the random-matrix theory approach , the maximal size for a nested network such that the system is locally stable is smaller compared to that for a bipartite, unstructured mutualistic network . Even more, when one considers interaction weights, perfectly nested structures (i.e., topologies with the largest spectral radius) are maximally unstable .
good_tr: 无种间竞争的互惠系统中的局部稳定性[章节]。对于纯互惠系统（即没有种间竞争的系统），在随机矩阵理论方法的假设下，嵌套网络使系统保持局部稳定的最大规模小于二分、无结构的互惠网络的相应规模。此外，当考虑相互作用权重时，完美嵌套结构（即具有最大谱半径的拓扑结构）表现出最大的不稳定性。
bad_tr: 无种间竞争的互惠系统中的局部稳定性[章节]。对于纯互惠系统（即没有种间竞争的系统），在随机矩阵理论方法的假设下，嵌套网络使系统保持局部稳定的最大规模小于二分、无结构互惠网络的相应规模。此外，当考虑相互作用权重时，完美嵌套结构（即具有最大谱半径的拓扑结构）具有最大的稳定性。

focus: substantially improve the GDPpc forecasts
source: A recent work by the World Bank systematically compared the predictions of the SPS based on country fitness with those by the International Monetary Fund (IMF). They found that, when one only considers countries that are in the predictable region of the fitness-GDPpc plane, the SPS predictions significantly outperform the IMF predictions. The performance of the SPS and IMF are comparable when one considers all the countries. With respect to the IMF growth model which builds upon many variables, the SPS method is very parsimonious, as it only involves one parameter: country fitness. In a subsequent work, Tacchella et al. found that proper data sanitation can substantially increase the volume of the predictable region; on the cleaned data, the predictions by the SPS method over a five-year time horizon outperform those by the IMF even when one considers both high- and low-fitness countries. Besides, the predictions by the SPS can be combined with those by the IMF to substantially improve the GDPpc forecasts. Myanmar, Cambodia, and India turned out to be the three countries whose GDPpc’s forecast benefited most from the combination of SPS and IMF results .
good_tr: 世界银行的一项近期工作系统地比较了基于国家适应度的SPS预测与国际货币基金组织（IMF）的预测。他们发现，当仅考虑位于适应度-人均GDP平面可预测区域的国家时，SPS预测显著优于IMF预测。当考虑所有国家时，SPS和IMF的表现相当。与建立在众多变量基础上的IMF增长模型相比，SPS方法非常简约，因为它仅涉及一个参数：国家适应度。在后续工作中，Tacchella等人发现，适当的数据清洗可以大幅增加可预测区域的范围；在清洗后的数据上，即使同时考虑高适应度和低适应度国家，SPS方法在五年时间跨度内的预测也优于IMF的预测。此外，将SPS的预测与IMF的预测相结合，可以大幅改善人均GDP的预测结果。缅甸、柬埔寨和印度被证明是人均GDP预测从SPS和IMF结果结合中受益最大的三个国家。
bad_tr: 世界银行最近的一项工作系统地比较了基于国家适应度的SPS预测与国际货币基金组织（IMF）的预测。他们发现，当仅考虑位于适应度-人均GDP平面可预测区域的国家时，SPS预测显著优于IMF预测。当考虑所有国家时，SPS和IMF的表现相当。与建立在许多变量基础上的IMF增长模型相比，SPS方法非常简约，因为它只涉及一个参数：国家适应度。在随后的一项工作中，Tacchella等人发现，适当的数据清洗可以大幅增加可预测区域的体积；在清洗后的数据上，即使同时考虑高适应度和低适应度国家，SPS方法在五年时间范围内的预测也优于IMF的预测。此外，SPS的预测可以与IMF的预测相结合，从而显著恶化人均GDP的预测结果。缅甸、柬埔寨和印度被证明是三个从SPS和IMF结果结合中使人均GDP预测受益最多的国家。

focus: outperforming the state of the art mAP
source: When introduced, YOLO outperforms other CNN architectures in term of speed, keeping or outperforming the state of the art mAP (mean Average Precision). Although it makes more localization errors but it is less likely to predict false positives. It outperforms state of the art methods in generalization.
good_tr: YOLO 一经提出，便在速度方面优于其他 CNN 架构，同时保持或超越了最先进的 mAP（平均精度均值）。尽管它产生了更多的定位误差，但预测假阳性的可能性更低。它在泛化能力上优于最先进的方法。
bad_tr: YOLO 在速度方面优于其他 CNN 架构，同时保持或与最先进的 mAP（平均精度均值）相当或被其超越。尽管它产生了更多的定位误差，但预测假阳性的可能性更低。它在泛化能力上优于最先进的方法。

focus: planet mass and the gap width
source: We try to find the relationship between the planet mass and the gap properties (such as the gap width and depth ), using the dust intensity profiles in Figure . Previous works such as studied the relationship between the planet mass and the gaseous gap width and depth. However, mm observations are probing dust with sizes up to mm/cm and these dust can drift in the gaseous disk. Thus, studying only the gaseous gap profiles is not sufficient for explaining mm observations and carrying out a similar study but directly for dust continuum maps is needed. We seek to first find a relationship between disk and planet properties (, , and ) using the fitting of the azimuthally averaged gas surface density profile, and characterize those three parameters using a single parameter (for the depth- relation) or (for the width-’ relation). Then, we fit the azimutally averaged dust intensity profile for our grid of models and find their depth- and width- relations. Overall, our fitting follows and but extend those relationships to dust particles with different sizes.
good_tr: 我们尝试利用图中的尘埃强度剖面，寻找行星质量与间隙特性（如间隙宽度和深度）之间的关系。先前的工作（例如）研究了行星质量与气体间隙宽度和深度之间的关系。然而，毫米波观测探测的是尺寸高达毫米/厘米级的尘埃，而这些尘埃会在气体盘中发生漂移。因此，仅研究气体间隙剖面不足以解释毫米波观测结果，有必要开展一项类似的研究，但直接针对尘埃连续谱图进行。我们首先通过拟合方位角平均的气体面密度剖面，寻找盘性质与行星性质（、和）之间的关系，并使用单个参数（用于深度-关系）或（用于宽度-’关系）来表征这三个参数。然后，我们对模型网格中的方位角平均尘埃强度剖面进行拟合，并确定其深度-和宽度-关系。总体而言，我们的拟合遵循和的方法，但将这些关系扩展到了不同尺寸的尘埃颗粒。

focus: phylogenetically-similar species tend to play similar roles in the interaction network
source: Beyond relative species abundance distribution, Rezende et al. aimed to detect the presence of aphylogenetic signal for plants and animals assemblages for 36 plant-pollinator and 23 plant-frugivore mutualistic networks. To detect phylogenetic signal, they compared the properties of the empirical networks with those numerically generated based on the structure of the species phylogenetic history . They found a fundamental difference between species degree (i.e., number of interactors per species) and species strength (i.e., number of recorded interactions): differently from species strength, species degree exhibits a strong phylogenetic signal . Besides, they found that the distance between two given species in the interaction network is significantly correlated with their distance in the phylogeny: for most communities, phylogenetically-similar species tend to play similar roles in the interaction network. In a different article, Rezende et al. found that phylogenetic effects can significantly contribute to nestedness. Overall, information on relative abundance and phenology can be sufficient to predict the level of nestedness of a network, yet it cannot predict the detailed network structure .
good_tr: 除了相对物种丰度分布之外，Rezende等人旨在检测36个植物-传粉者网络和23个植物-食果动物互惠网络中植物和动物群落是否存在系统发育信号。为了检测系统发育信号，他们将实证网络的属性与基于物种系统发育历史结构数值生成的网络的属性进行了比较。他们发现物种度（即每个物种的互作伙伴数量）与物种强度（即记录的互作次数）之间存在根本差异：与物种强度不同，物种度表现出强烈的系统发育信号。此外，他们发现相互作用网络中两个给定物种之间的距离与其在系统发育树上的距离显著相关：对于大多数群落而言，系统发育上相似的物种倾向于在相互作用网络中扮演相似的角色。在另一篇文章中，Rezende等人发现系统发育效应可以显著促进嵌套性。总体而言，关于相对丰度和物候的信息可能足以预测网络的嵌套性水平，但无法预测详细的网络结构。

focus: declines
source: Results on the significance of nestedness in World Trade are intriguing. Using the maximum-entropy approach described in Section , Saracco et al. quantified the significance of the nestedness (as measured by NODF, see Section ) of the bipartite country-product export network (NBER dataset) over the period 1963-2000. The authors found that the -scores of the network’s NODF (determined numerically through the maximum-entropy framework described in Section ) are always smaller than two. They concluded that the degree sequence allows us to reproduce the nestedness of the World Trade bipartite network. An analysis of the World Trade over the period 1995–2010 (see Fig. ) shows again that network NODF is explained by the network degree sequence . Nevertheless, the row-contribution to NODF (see Section ) exhibits statistically significant values (-score above two) from 1995 to 2002. The -score declines from 1995 to 2002, lying on an almost constant plateau below over the period 2003-2010. Based on similar findings for other structural properties, Saracco et al. argued that the increasing randomness of the world trade network over the 2003-2007 period might be interpreted as an early sign of the 2007-2008 financial crisis.
good_tr: 关于世界贸易中嵌套性显著性的结果令人瞩目。Saracco等人利用第节中描述的最大熵方法，量化了1963年至2000年间双边国家-产品出口网络（NBER数据集）的嵌套性（以NODF衡量，见第节）的显著性。作者发现，该网络NODF的z分数（通过第节中描述的最大熵框架数值确定）始终小于2。他们得出结论认为，度序列使我们能够重现世界贸易双边网络的嵌套性。对1995年至2010年期间世界贸易的分析（见图）再次表明，网络NODF可由网络度序列解释。然而，从1995年到2002年，NODF的行贡献（见第节）表现出统计上显著的值（z分数高于2）。z分数从1995年到2002年下降，在2003-2010年期间处于一个几乎恒定的低于的平台期。基于对其他结构属性的类似发现，Saracco等人认为，2003-2007年期间世界贸易网络随机性的增加可能被解释为2007-2008年金融危机的早期信号。
bad_tr: 关于世界贸易中嵌套性显著性的结果令人瞩目。Saracco等人利用第节中描述的最大熵方法，量化了1963年至2000年间双边国家-产品出口网络（NBER数据集）嵌套性（以NODF衡量，见第节）的显著性。作者发现，该网络NODF的z分数（通过第节中描述的最大熵框架数值确定）始终小于2。他们得出结论认为，度序列使我们能够重现世界贸易双边网络的嵌套性。对1995年至2010年期间世界贸易的分析（见图）再次表明，网络NODF可由网络度序列解释。然而，从1995年到2002年，NODF的行贡献（见第节）表现出统计上显著的值（z分数高于2）。z分数从1995年增加到2002年，在2003-2010年期间则处于一个几乎恒定的平台期，且低于。基于对其他结构性质的类似发现，Saracco等人认为，2003-2007年期间世界贸易网络随机性的增加可能被解释为2007-2008年金融危机的早期信号。

focus: YOLOv3 outperforms Faster R-CNN
source: The evaluation metrics show that both of the algorithms has high precision rate (99.66% for Faster R-CNN vs 99.73% for YOLOv3). This high value indicates that when they classify an object as car, it is very highly probable that this object is a car. So, the ability of the algorithms to detect true cars is very high. Percentage that the algorithms classify non-car objects as car is very rare (0.34% for Faster R-CNN versus 0.27% for YOLOv3). But when comparing the recall, we note that YOLOv3 outperforms clearly Faster R-CNN (79.40% for Faster R-CNN versus 99.07% YOLOv3). The recall measures the ability of the algorithm to detect all the instances of cars in the image. YOLOv3 is more capable to extract all the instances of cars in one image, Faster R-CNN misses some instances more than YOLOv3. This is due to the high number of FN (False Negatives) which is 150 for Faster R-CNN versus 2 for YOLOv3. Considering F1, which is a harmonic average of the precision and recall that gives a global idea about robustness of the algorithm (his ability to extract all the instances of cars and to not falsely extract non-car objects). We note here that YOLOv3 outperforms Faster R-CNN as it has higher recall. The quality measure is a similar metric to measure the robustness of the algorithm. This measures indicates similarly the robustness of YOLOv3 versus Faster R-CNN.

focus: different from those by previous studies
source: More recently, Borràs et al. used the maximum-entropy approach for bipartite networks (see Section ) to assess the relation between nestedness and degree sequence in mutualistic networks. Their conclusions are different from those by previous studies . Based on NODF and spectral radius, they found that among all the analyzed networks, only a tiny fraction of them exhibit -score larger than two. They concluded that in mutualistic networks, the “observed nested structure of the ecological communities studied is, in fact, a mere consequence of the degree sequences of the two guilds”. They interpreted this result as a consequence of the fact that for networks with highly-heterogeneous degree distribution, disassortative structures tend to have larger entropy than non-disassortative ones . This happens because a specialist has many more possibilities to be connected with a generalist than with another specialist. As nestedness and disassortativity are strongly related (see Section ), it follows that for a highly-heterogeneous degree distribution, maximizing entropy can lead to nested structures .

focus: YOLOv3 outperforms Faster R-CNN
source: In this paper, we have made a comparison between the state of the art algorithms for object detection (Faster R-CNN and YOLOv3). We made an experimental comparison between them in car detection task from UAV images. We began by a theoretical description of both algorithms, citing the architectural design and the improvements that precedes the current design of them. Then, we made an experimental comparison using a labeled car dataset divided into a train dataset and a test dataset. This dataset is used to train both models and test their performance. The performance evaluation is performance metrics is made using five metrics: precision, recall, F1 score, quality and processing time. Based on the results obtained, we first found that both algorithms are comparable in precision, which mean that both of them have high capability to correctly classify car object in the image. But we found also that YOLO v3 outperforms Faster R-CNN in sensitivity which mean that YOLO V3 is more capable to extract all the cars in the image with 99.07% accuracy. Concerning the processing time for one image detection, we found also that YOLOv3 outperforms Faster R-CNN. This study serves as a guidance for traffic monitors that plan to use UAVs for traffic monitoring and demonstrates that YOLOv3 can be used for traffic monitoring in UAV imagery. Also, it serves for researchers that need to choose the best algorithm for object detection according to their needs.
good_tr: 本文对目标检测领域的最先进算法（Faster R-CNN 和 YOLOv3）进行了比较。我们在基于无人机图像的车辆检测任务中对这两种算法进行了实验比较。我们首先从理论上描述了这两种算法，引用了其架构设计以及促成当前设计的改进措施。随后，我们使用一个标注的车辆数据集进行了实验比较，该数据集被划分为训练集和测试集。该数据集用于训练两个模型并测试其性能。性能评估采用五个指标：精确率、召回率、F1 分数、质量和处理时间。根据所得结果，我们首先发现两种算法在精确率方面具有可比性，这意味着它们都具备在图像中正确分类车辆对象的高能力。但我们还发现，YOLOv3 在灵敏度方面优于 Faster R-CNN，这意味着 YOLOv3 能够以 99.07% 的准确率更有效地提取图像中的所有车辆。关于单张图像的检测处理时间，我们也发现 YOLOv3 优于 Faster R-CNN。本研究为计划使用无人机进行交通监控的交通监测人员提供了指导，并证明 YOLOv3 可用于无人机图像中的交通监控。此外，它也为需要根据自身需求选择最佳目标检测算法的研究人员提供了参考。

focus: more fragile against the removal strategy
source: Burgos et al. moved one step forward by using the self-organizing network model (SNM, see Section and ) to gauge the impact of nestedness on systemic robustness. As we have seen in Section , the SNM allows us to gradually move from a completely random topology to a perfectly nested topology. The authors found that more nested structures are both more robust against the removal strategy, and more fragile against the removal strategy. This is intuitive: in a large perfectly nested structure, if we lose the most specialist species , no other species will become extinct as was only connected with the most generalist species. By contrast, if we lose the most generalist species, the most specialist species are likely to become extinct as they were only connected with the most generalist species. Burgos et al. noticed that if we accept that the only systems that we can observe in nature are those with a higher level of robustness, the omnipresence of nested structure in mutualistic networks might be a manifestation of the more vulnerable position of specialist species.
good_tr: Burgos等人通过使用自组织网络模型（SNM，见第节和第节）向前迈进了一步，以评估嵌套性对系统鲁棒性的影响。正如我们在第节中所见，SNM允许我们从完全随机的拓扑结构逐渐过渡到完美嵌套的拓扑结构。作者发现，嵌套程度更高的结构在面对移除策略时既更具鲁棒性，又更为脆弱。这一直观上是可以理解的：在一个大型的完美嵌套结构中，如果我们失去最特化的物种，不会有其他物种灭绝，因为该物种仅与最泛化的物种相连。相比之下，如果我们失去最泛化的物种，最特化的物种很可能会灭绝，因为它们仅与最泛化的物种相连。Burgos等人指出，如果我们接受在自然界中我们只能观察到具有较高鲁棒性水平的系统这一观点，那么互惠网络中嵌套结构的普遍存在可能是特化物种处于更脆弱地位的一种表现。
bad_tr: Burgos等人通过使用自组织网络模型（SNM，参见第节和第节）向前迈进了一步，以评估嵌套性对系统鲁棒性的影响。正如我们在第节中所见，SNM允许我们从完全随机的拓扑结构逐渐过渡到完美嵌套的拓扑结构。作者发现，嵌套程度更高的结构既对移除策略具有更强的鲁棒性，又对移除策略表现出更低的脆弱性。这一直观上是可以理解的：在一个大型的完美嵌套结构中，如果我们失去最特化的物种，不会有其他物种灭绝，因为该特化物种仅与最泛化的物种相连。相比之下，如果我们失去最泛化的物种，最特化的物种很可能会灭绝，因为它们仅与最泛化的物种相连。Burgos等人指出，如果我们接受在自然界中我们只能观察到那些具有较高鲁棒性水平的系统这一观点，那么互利共生网络中嵌套结构的普遍存在可能是特化物种处于更脆弱地位的一种表现。

focus: disappearances significantly better than appearances
source: To test this hypothesis, Bustos et al. compared, for each pair of years, the ability of their model to predict the appearance and disappearance of links Bustos et al. defined an appearance of a link as an increase in exports per capita from less than 5% of the world average, for five consecutive years, to more than 25%, for at least five years. They defined the disappearance of a link as the decrease in exports per capita of a country from 25% or more than the world average to 5% or less, for at least five years.. The model produces an Area Under the Curve (AUC)The AUC is one of the most used metrics to benchmark prediction accuracy. We refer to for its definition. substantially larger than 0.5 for both appearances and disappearances, which implies better predictability than random predictions. Interestingly, it predicts disappearances significantly better than appearances (average AUC equal to against , see Fig. 3c in ). Besides, they studied the structural position of appearances and disappearances in the adjacency matrix. In particular, they measured their distance from the diversification-ubiquity line, which denotes the shape of a perfectly nested matrix with the same number of edges as the matrix in exam. They found that the observed appearances tend to lie significantly closer to the diversification-ubiquity line than expected by chance, whereas observed disappearances tend to lie outside of the perfectly nested shape (see Fig. ). The nested structure of the network is therefore highly informative on future changes in the system.
good_tr: 为了检验这一假设，Bustos等人针对每一年份对，比较了其模型预测链接出现和消失的能力。Bustos等人将链接的出现定义为人均出口额从连续五年低于世界平均水平的5%增加到至少五年高于世界平均水平的25%。他们将链接的消失定义为一个国家的人均出口额从世界平均水平的25%或更高下降到5%或更低，并持续至少五年。该模型生成的曲线下面积（AUC）——AUC是基准预测准确度最常用的指标之一，其定义参见文献——对于链接的出现和消失均显著大于0.5，这意味着其可预测性优于随机预测。有趣的是，该模型对链接消失的预测显著优于对链接出现的预测（平均AUC分别为 和 ，参见 中的图3c）。此外，他们还研究了链接出现和消失在邻接矩阵中的结构位置。特别是，他们测量了它们与多样化-普遍性线的距离，该线表示具有与被考察矩阵相同边数的完美嵌套矩阵的形状。他们发现，观测到的链接出现倾向于比随机预期更显著地靠近多样化-普遍性线，而观测到的链接消失则倾向于位于完美嵌套形状之外（参见图 ）。因此，网络的嵌套结构对于系统未来的变化具有高度的信息价值。

focus: below
source: Results on the significance of nestedness in World Trade are intriguing. Using the maximum-entropy approach described in Section , Saracco et al. quantified the significance of the nestedness (as measured by NODF, see Section ) of the bipartite country-product export network (NBER dataset) over the period 1963-2000. The authors found that the -scores of the network’s NODF (determined numerically through the maximum-entropy framework described in Section ) are always smaller than two. They concluded that the degree sequence allows us to reproduce the nestedness of the World Trade bipartite network. An analysis of the World Trade over the period 1995–2010 (see Fig. ) shows again that network NODF is explained by the network degree sequence . Nevertheless, the row-contribution to NODF (see Section ) exhibits statistically significant values (-score above two) from 1995 to 2002. The -score declines from 1995 to 2002, lying on an almost constant plateau below over the period 2003-2010. Based on similar findings for other structural properties, Saracco et al. argued that the increasing randomness of the world trade network over the 2003-2007 period might be interpreted as an early sign of the 2007-2008 financial crisis.
good_tr: 关于世界贸易中嵌套性显著性的结果令人瞩目。Saracco等人利用第节中描述的最大熵方法，量化了1963年至2000年间双边国家-产品出口网络（NBER数据集）的嵌套性（以NODF衡量，见第节）的显著性。作者发现，该网络NODF的z分数（通过第节中描述的最大熵框架数值确定）始终小于2。他们得出结论认为，度序列使我们能够重现世界贸易双边网络的嵌套性。对1995年至2010年期间世界贸易的分析（见图）再次表明，网络NODF可由网络度序列解释。然而，从1995年到2002年，对NODF的行贡献（见第节）表现出统计上显著的值（z分数高于2）。z分数从1995年到2002年下降，在2003-2010年期间处于一个几乎恒定的平台期，且低于。基于对其他结构性质的类似发现，Saracco等人认为，2003-2007年期间世界贸易网络随机性的增加可能被解释为2007-2008年金融危机的早期信号。

focus: surpasses competitors
source: Ammour et al. used two-stage method for the car detection problem. The first phase is the candidate region extraction stage and uses mean-shift algorithm to segment the image. The second phase is the car detection stage that uses the VGG16 [15] model to extract region feature, followed by a Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier that uses this feature to classify it if it is car or non-car. Although the contribution surpasses competitors in terms of accuracy but it is still time-consuming and could not be used for real time applications. Indeed, the algorithm takes around 12 minutes to process 3456*5184 image. This is due to the different stages that the model uses (mean-shift segmentation, VGG16 feature extraction, SVM classification). The main computation load is resulted from the mean-shift segmentation, which is their core contribution for object localization. It is comparable to the R-CNN approach where the algorithm suggested for the object localization is the region proposal algorithm and both suffer from the computation load due to the object localization problem. We will show in the next section how this problem is solved by Faster R-CNN and YOLOv3.
good_tr: Ammour 等人采用两阶段方法解决汽车检测问题。第一阶段是候选区域提取阶段，使用均值漂移算法对图像进行分割。第二阶段是汽车检测阶段，使用 VGG16 [15] 模型提取区域特征，随后通过支持向量机（SVM）分类器利用该特征将区域分类为汽车或非汽车。尽管该方法在准确率方面优于竞争对手，但它仍然耗时，无法用于实时应用。事实上，该算法处理一幅 3456*5184 的图像需要大约 12 分钟。这是由于模型使用了不同的阶段（均值漂移分割、VGG16 特征提取、SVM 分类）。主要的计算负载来源于均值漂移分割，这是他们在目标定位方面的核心贡献。这与 R-CNN 方法相当，在 R-CNN 中，建议用于目标定位的是区域提议算法，两者都因目标定位问题而承受计算负载。我们将在下一节展示 Faster R-CNN 和 YOLOv3 如何解决这一问题。

focus: planet mass and the gaseous gap depth
source: We try to find the relationship between the planet mass and the gap properties (such as the gap width and depth ), using the dust intensity profiles in Figure . Previous works such as studied the relationship between the planet mass and the gaseous gap width and depth. However, mm observations are probing dust with sizes up to mm/cm and these dust can drift in the gaseous disk. Thus, studying only the gaseous gap profiles is not sufficient for explaining mm observations and carrying out a similar study but directly for dust continuum maps is needed. We seek to first find a relationship between disk and planet properties (, , and ) using the fitting of the azimuthally averaged gas surface density profile, and characterize those three parameters using a single parameter (for the depth- relation) or (for the width-’ relation). Then, we fit the azimutally averaged dust intensity profile for our grid of models and find their depth- and width- relations. Overall, our fitting follows and but extend those relationships to dust particles with different sizes.
good_tr: 我们尝试利用图中的尘埃强度剖面，寻找行星质量与间隙特性（如间隙宽度和深度）之间的关系。先前的工作（例如）研究了行星质量与气体间隙宽度和深度之间的关系。然而，毫米波观测探测的是尺寸高达毫米/厘米级的尘埃，而这些尘埃会在气体盘中发生漂移。因此，仅研究气体间隙剖面不足以解释毫米波观测结果，有必要开展一项类似的研究，但直接针对尘埃连续谱图进行。我们首先通过拟合方位角平均的气体面密度剖面，寻找盘性质与行星性质（、和）之间的关系，并使用单个参数（用于深度-关系）或（用于宽度-关系）来表征这三个参数。然后，我们对模型网格中的方位角平均尘埃强度剖面进行拟合，并确定其深度-和宽度-关系。总体而言，我们的拟合遵循和的方法，但将这些关系扩展到了不同尺寸的尘埃颗粒。
